heading: Assistance by Department of Defense
label: 220107 Assistance by Department of Defense
text: The Secretary of Defense may make the resources of the Department of Defense, including access to General Services Administration supplies and services through the Federal Supply Schedule of the General Services Administration, available to the corporation to the extent compatible with the primary mission of the Department and in accordance with guidelines issued by the Secretary.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)22010736:1308., , .Dec. 29, 1979Pub. L. 96–165, § 893 Stat. 1271The words “Secretary of Defense” are substituted for “Department of Defense” the first time they appear because of 10:113(a). The words “in order to facilitate the accomplishment of the USO mission” are omitted as unnecessary.

Amendments2004— inserted “, including access to General Services Administration supplies and services through the Federal Supply Schedule of the General Services Administration,” after “Department of Defense”.Pub. L. 108–375
